layout.card_style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
layout.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-zinc-800
layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950 h-screen fixed

login_background.description: Warsaw skyline night for login split screen
login_background.usage: Right side of the login/auth screens with a dark overlay (bg-black/60) to maintain high contrast.

accessibility.contrast_strategy: High contrast black and white primarily, colors used only for semantic meaning (error, success).
accessibility.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto for headings; implement Chivo.
Ensure the dashboard uses a dense, technical grid layout.
Buttons should be stark white with black text for primary actions, leaning into the Brutalist Swiss style.
Integrate the provided Warsaw skyline image on the authentication pages with a heavy dark overlay.
Ensure language switcher (EN/PL) is prominently placed in the header or sidebar.
All cards should have sharp corners (rounded-sm maximum) and subtle 1px borders, no soft shadows.
Use Shadcn UI components but override their default rounded corners to match the rounded-sm requirement.
